'''Ebor Taulk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], and was selected as the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Naeshahn]]. The pair was dispatched by [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] to investigate the disturbance in the [[Yinchorri system]], unknowingly walking into the midst of a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Grand Plan/Legends|plot]]. Upon their arrival, the Sith-incited violence on [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]] overwhelmed Naeshahn and Padawan Taulk and they were killed by the war-like [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]]. At the behest of [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], the architect of the uprising, [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] and [[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]] arranged for the bodies of the Jedi to be shipped to the [[Presidential Tower]] of the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]] on Coruscant. [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]] then contacted the High Council in hopes that they would send a larger strike force to deal with the [[Yinchorri Uprising]].<ref name="AOW" />
